cover.subtitle:
여운형과 김규식,
분단을 막으려 한 손.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: two middle-aged Korean men in 1940s suits — one in dark gray suit (left), one in dark blue suit (right) — clasping hands firmly in the center, profile view. Behind them: a faint silhouette of the Korean peninsula with a thin red dashed line at the middle. Background: muted gray sky with a small American jeep silhouette in the distance. Color: gray suits + a subtle teal accent on the handshake + red dividing line. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 좌우합작 7원칙의 토지 분배 방식, 정읍 발언과의 시간 순서, 미군정의 태도 변화, 여운형 암살 이후 흐름이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to two small clasping-hands silhouettes. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
